--- drop_view_if_exists.sql
DROP VIEW IF EXISTS SingersView

--- AST
&ast.DropView{
  IfExists: true,
  Name:     &ast.Path{
    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
      &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 20,
        NameEnd: 31,
        Name:    "SingersView",
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
DROP VIEW IF EXISTS SingersView
